testcase.name: test_today_actions

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 'actions' in {'by_category': {'compliance': 5, 'goal': 2, 'rebalancing': 8, 'retention': 2, ...}, 'focus_message': '#x1F4CB 4 high-priority actions for today', 'generated_at': '2026-03-17T07:03:37.958893+00:00', 'impact_summary': {'clients_needing_rebalance': 8, 'compliance_overdue': 2, 'potential_tax_savings': 0, 'revenue_at_risk': 0}, ...}

testcase.name: test_all_actions

failure.message: assert 'total' in {'actions': [{'action_steps': ['Reduce: intl_equities (+5%), tech (+8%)', 'Increase: aus_equities (-5%), bonds (-8%)', 'Execute rebalance trades', 'Update client on changes'], 'category': 'rebalancing', 'client_id': 'client_2', 'client_name': 'Chen Investment Trust', ...}, {'action_steps': ['Reduce: aus_equities (+5%), cash (+20%)', 'Increase: bonds (-25%)', 'Execute rebalance trades', 'Update client on changes'], 'category': 'rebalancing', 'client_id': 'client_3', 'client_name': 'Thompson SMSF', ...}, {'action_steps': ["Review client's liquidity needs", 'Propose investment options aligned with risk profile', 'Execute deployment strategy'], 'category': 'revenue', 'client_id': 'client_3', 'client_name': 'Thompson SMSF', ...}, {'action_steps': ['Reduce: tech (+10%)', 'Increase: aus_equities (-5%), intl_equities (-5%), bonds (-5%)', 'Execute rebalance trades', 'Update client on changes'], 'category': 'rebalancing', 'client_id': 'client_4', 'client_name': 'Patel Holdings', ...}, {'action_steps': ['Reduce: aus_equities (+5%), cash (+7%)', 'Increase: bonds (-7%), property (-5%)', 'Execute rebalance trades', 'Update client on changes'], 'category': 'rebalancing', 'client_id': 'client_5', 'client_name': 'Garcia Family', ...}, {'action_steps': ['Reduce: aus_equities (+5%), cash (+5%)', 'Increase: bonds (-12%)', 'Execute rebalance trades', 'Update client on changes'], 'category': 'rebalancing', 'client_id': 'client_6', 'client_name': 'Anderson SMSF', ...}, ...], 'generated_at': '2026-03-17T07:03:38.080105+00:00', 'total_actions': 36}

testcase.name: test_health_score
